marketing.title: One subscription per company — not per user

points.oneSubscription: One subscription covers your entire company
points.growFreely: Add employees freely as your business grows

compare.title: Compare every feature
compare.caption: Feature availability across Starter, Professional, Business and Enterprise plans

creditCard.q: Do I need a credit card to start?
creditCard.a: No. Every plan includes a 14-day free trial with no credit card required. You only add payment details if you decide to continue.

trial.q: How does the free trial work?
trial.a: You get full access to your chosen plan for 14 days. There's no commitment — subscribe anytime during or after the trial to keep going.

cancel.a: Yes. You can cancel whenever you like. Your plan stays active until the end of the billing period, and your data is always kept.

upgrade.a: Absolutely. You can upgrade at any time and the change takes effect immediately, with any difference prorated.

downgrade.a: Yes. Downgrades take effect at the end of your current billing period, and your existing data is always preserved.

perEmployee.a: Never. Axeriva is one subscription per company. Add as many employees as your plan allows without paying per seat.

afterTrial.q: What happens after the trial ends?
afterTrial.a: If you haven't subscribed, your account becomes read-only — you can still sign in and view or export your data, and subscribe anytime to restore full access.

enterprise.a: Enterprise is tailored to your organization with custom limits, SSO/SCIM, white-label, an SLA and a dedicated account manager. Contact our sales team to get started.

hero.description: Schedule your crews, track employees and projects, manage customers and time — all in one modern, easy-to-use platform.
